rule: Only exact SVE reverse facts from the remaining second-source queue are accepted. No other SVE finishes or card numbers are inferred.
tls_note: Local Node TLS validation failed for one or more source pages; this script used curl.exe --ssl-no-revoke as a command-level fallback. No insecure TLS behavior is made default.

fact.required_next_evidence: Exact card-level finish evidence from a human-readable, official, collector, or marketplace checklist plus independent agreement.
recommended_source_ladder: Official checklist or set checklist with exact reverse-holo coverage
Collector checklist/card page naming the exact card number and reverse finish
Marketplace checklist row with exact card number, card name, set, and reverse finish
